nasb.text: And you will be like one who lies down in the middle of the sea, Or like one who lies down on the top of a mast.

esv.text: You will be like one who lies down in the midst of the sea, like one who lies on the top of a mast.

cnv.text: 你必好像躺在海中， 又好像躺在桅杆頂上。

ccb.text: 你好像躺在怒海中， 又像卧在桅杆顶上。

csbs.text: 你就像是躺在海中， 也像躺在桅杆顶端，说：
